input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Inherited defect: the reference model the surrogate was trained against carries a recorded rejection the child does not reconcile.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 hierarchical credibility; proto-taxonomy D-PD-01

case_context.cou: surrogate stands in for a CFD model rejected for this COU

input.raw_artifact: Model card — thermal surrogate. The surrogate reproduces its CFD thermal reference to 0.8% NRMSE for the same context of use. The reference CFD model carries a recorded decision of Not Accepted for this COU, with the open finding that mesh independence was not demonstrated. This package does not revisit that finding.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The surrogate is faithful to its CFD reference, but that reference was formally Not Accepted for this COU (mesh-independence undemonstrated); inheriting fidelity to a rejected reference inherits the unresolved defect.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the surrogate itself is inaccurate (a verdict the inheritance does not establish)
treats fidelity to the reference as independent credibility

hardness.obvious_signal: the surrogate reproduces its CFD reference almost perfectly (NRMSE 0.8%)
hardness.conflicting_signal: the CFD reference it was trained against was formally Not Accepted for this same thermal COU (mesh-independence not demonstrated); fidelity to a rejected reference inherits the rejection

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 hierarchical credibility: a surrogate's credibility is bounded by its reference; an unreconciled reference rejection propagates.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
